creator: ports@stdrand.com
text:
Yeah I approve; it's actually me who submitted this, but put in the wrong
email by accident.

On 6 January 2013 13:10, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/ChipmunkPhysics,
>
> Please note that PR ports/175057 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/175057
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
